title: ListDrafts
description: Users who draft changes need visibility into what is parked so they can decide what to resume. The `ListDrafts` use case retrieves all drafted changes from the default workspace — those temporarily set aside that can be restored to active status later.
context: Users who draft changes need visibility into what is parked so they can decide what to resume. The `ListDrafts` use case retrieves all drafted changes from the default workspace — those temporarily set aside that can be restored to active status later.

rules: `ListDrafts.execute()` MUST return all changes that are in the drafted lifecycle state. The result MUST be sorted by creation order, oldest first.

`ListDrafts.execute()` MUST return `DraftedChangeView[]`. Each view MUST expose artifact state (status, validated hashes) and any fields required for listing (including `history` for the latest `drafted` event) but MUST NOT include artifact file content.

Callers MUST NOT receive a `Change` aggregate from this use case.

`ListDrafts` MUST accept a `ChangeRepository` as its sole constructor argument. It MUST delegate to `ChangeRepository.listDrafts()` and return the resulting `DraftedChangeView[]` without wrapping in mutable `Change` instances.

rules.requirement: Returns an empty array when no drafted changes exist
rules: When the repository contains no drafted changes, `execute()` MUST return an empty array. It MUST NOT throw.

rules.requirement: Config-based factory preserves complete change repository bootstrap
rules:
When `createListDrafts(config)` initializes a `ChangeRepository` from `SpecdConfig`, the repository MUST preserve complete artifact-type and spec-existence bootstrap semantics.

The config-based factory MUST NOT construct a weaker repository variant that can derive different draft artifact states for the same persisted change than the canonical listing read path.

The config-based `createListDrafts(config, options?)` form MUST derive `ListDraftsDeps` through `resolveListDraftsDeps(resolver)` and then delegate to canonical `createListDrafts(deps)`.

`resolveListDraftsDeps(resolver)` MUST resolve:

- `changes: ChangeRepository`

The helper is the only use-case-specific composition entry for config-based bootstrap. The factory MUST NOT reconstruct fs-shaped wiring inline.

scenarios.name: Constructor accepts ChangeRepository
then: it requires a ChangeRepository in its constructor

scenarios.name: Multiple drafted changes exist
given: the repository contains three drafted changes created in order: alpha, beta, gamma
then: the result contains all three changes in creation order: alpha, beta, gamma

scenarios.name: Active and discarded changes are excluded
given: the repository contains drafted change alpha, active change beta, and discarded change gamma

scenarios.name: Views have artifact state but no content
then: each entry satisfies DraftedChangeView with isDrafted === true
AND no artifact file content is loaded

scenarios.name: Views are not Change instances
then: entries do not expose transition or other Change mutators

scenarios.name: Empty drafts directory returns empty list
Active changes are excluded
given: AND old-work exists only under drafts/

scenarios.requirement: Returns an empty array when no drafted changes exist
scenarios.name: Repository is empty
given: the repository contains no changes at all
then: the result is an empty array

scenarios.requirement: Returns an empty array when no drafted changes exist
scenarios.name: All changes are active or discarded
given: the repository contains only active and discarded changes
then: the result is an empty array

scenarios.requirement: Config-based factory preserves complete change repository bootstrap
scenarios.name: Config-wired draft listing preserves artifact-type repository semantics
given: createListDrafts(config) initializes a ChangeRepository from SpecdConfig
when: ListDrafts.execute() reads drafted changes through that repository
then: draft artifact states are derived with complete artifact-type and spec-existence bootstrap semantics
AND the config-based factory does not expose a weaker change repository variant

scenarios.name: createListDrafts config form derives ListDraftsDeps through resolveListDraftsDeps
then: it creates a composition resolver for that composition session
AND it derives ListDraftsDeps through resolveListDraftsDeps(resolver)
AND the factory delegates to canonical createListDrafts(deps)
